channel.title: Game Changer Animated
channel.description: Latest releases from Game Changer Animated on Dropout.tv

item.title: Welcome to Mountport
item.description:
Zeke, Zach, and Jess sing about a town where the mountains meet the sea. Accompaniment by Scott Paserella. Animated by Trevor Dedekind and Cassie Robinson.

Duration: 02:34

Tags: Game Changer Animated, Game Changer, animation, game shows, challenges, competitions, improv, surprises, mad skills, unscripted, singing, musicals, sam reich, jessica mckenna, zach reino, zeke nicholson, scott passerella, yukfoo animation, trevor dedekind, cassie robinson
